description: operator trust anchor. Pipeline health, attribution coverage, vocabulary hygiene, WMS hygiene.

panels.description: scope: attributed messages, excluding trailing 24h (pending nightly sweep). Green >=95%, yellow >=80%, red <80%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method != 'unallocated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1
) AS attribution_pct
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)

panels.title: Attribution % (excl. trailing 24h)

panels.description: scope: messages with method=unallocated in selected window. High count = unrecovered spend.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unalloc_count, ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS unalloc_cost
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE ua.method = 'unallocated'
  AND tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: Unallocated Messages (window)

panels.description: scope: unallocated cost in window. Bright red = spend not attributed to any entity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unalloc_count, ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS unalloc_cost
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE ua.method = 'unallocated'
  AND tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: Unallocated Cost (window)

panels.description: Hours since last recovery-method row was written. Green < 26h (within one sweep cycle), yellow < 48h, red = stale.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,
    GREATEST(
      COALESCE((SELECT MAX(recovered_at) FROM recovery_evidence), '2000-01-01'),
      COALESCE((SELECT MAX(recovered_at) FROM warmup_evidence), '2000-01-01'),
      COALESCE((SELECT MAX(recovered_at) FROM synthesis_evidence), '2000-01-01'),
      COALESCE((SELECT MAX(recovered_at) FROM gap_evidence), '2000-01-01')
    ),
    NOW()
  ) / 60.0, 1
) AS hours_since_sweep

panels.title: Last Sweep Activity

panels.description: Lag between MAX(cost_facts.timestamp) and MAX(token_ledger.timestamp). Shows how stale the rollup is. Green < 2h, yellow < 6h, red > 6h.
panels.title: Rollup Freshness Lag

panels.description: Minutes since last classifier-derived interval (assembled_at). Green < 15 min (within one classify timer cycle), yellow < 60, red = stale.
panels.title: Classify Freshness

panels.description: scope: attributed messages, excluding trailing 24h. Coverage trend. Dip at right edge = pending nightly sweep (expected behavior, not breakage).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ua.method != 'unallocated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS attribution_pct
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Attribution Coverage Trend (excl. trailing 24h — pending sweep)

panels.description: scope: all attribution methods in selected window. Shows the recovery pipeline contribution — temporal_join=direct, transcript/warmup/gap/synthesis=recovered.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  ua.method AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, ua.method
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Attribution Method Mix (per day)

panels.description: Recovery method totals for selected window. Headline: only ~33% direct — the rest recovered by sweep passes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ua.method,
  COUNT(*) AS messages,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS cost,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY ua.method
ORDER BY messages DESC

panels.title: Attribution Method Totals

panels.description: Deferred residuals: messages on hosts/users where transcripts were not available for recovery. Run rollup on that host to recover.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(tl.host, '(unknown)') AS host,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(tl.username, ''), '(unstamped)') AS username,
  COUNT(*) AS unalloc_msgs,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS unalloc_cost
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE ua.method = 'unallocated'
  AND tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY tl.host, tl.username
ORDER BY unalloc_cost DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Deferred Residuals by Host/User (recover on that host)

panels.description: scope: hookd HTTP /event endpoint. Events ingested per minute. Drop to zero = hookd down or hook client not firing.
panels.title: Hook Events/min (Prometheus)

panels.description: scope: immediate ledger. Minutes since last ingested message per host. Green < 30 min, yellow < 2h, red > 2h.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(host, '(unknown)') AS host,
  ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, MAX(timestamp), NOW()) / 60.0, 0) AS lag_min,
  DATE_FORMAT(MAX(timestamp), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i UTC') AS last_message
FROM token_ledger
GROUP BY host
ORDER BY lag_min DESC

panels.title: Token Scraper Lag by Host

panels.description: Process up/down for hookd (the only Teamster service with a Prometheus scrape target). MCP servers are stdio — not scraped.
panels.title: Service Health

panels.description: Active workunits missing one or more required tags (product, work-type, phase). These will not appear in tag-faceted cost panels.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wu.id,
  wu.title,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT req.tag_key ORDER BY req.tag_key SEPARATOR ', ') AS missing_tags,
  ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cf.cost_usd) FROM cost_facts cf WHERE cf.entity_type='workunit' AND cf.entity_id=wu.id AND cf.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()), 0), 2) AS cost
FROM workunits wu
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'product' AS tag_key UNION ALL SELECT 'work-type' UNION ALL SELECT 'phase') req
WHERE wu.status NOT IN ('done')
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM entity_tags_resolved etr
    JOIN tags t ON t.id = etr.tag_id AND t.tag_key = req.tag_key
    WHERE etr.entity_type = 'workunit' AND etr.entity_id = wu.id
  )
GROUP BY wu.id, wu.title
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Active Workunits Missing Required Tags

panels.description: Tag key drift: keys defined with conflicting category or cardinality. Live data shows work-type and source duplicated — causes incorrect cost splits.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  tag_key,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT category ORDER BY category SEPARATOR ', ') AS categories,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cardinality ORDER BY cardinality SEPARATOR ', ') AS cardinalities,
  COUNT(DISTINCT tag_value) AS values_count
FROM tags
WHERE retired = 0
GROUP BY tag_key
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT category) > 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT cardinality) > 1
ORDER BY tag_key

panels.title: Tag Key Drift (conflicting definitions)

panels.description: Stale sessions: status != closed and last_seen > 24h ago. These may represent crashed or orphaned sessions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  session_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(agent_name,''), '(lead)') AS agent_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(team_name,''), '(no team)') AS team_name,
  status,
  ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, last_seen, NOW()) / 3600.0, 1) AS hours_stale
FROM sessions
WHERE status != 'closed'
  AND last_seen < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
ORDER BY last_seen ASC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Stale Sessions (not closed, last_seen > 24h)

panels.description: Oldest open outcomes. Ancient open outcomes may indicate stale WMS state or forgotten work.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  o.id,
  o.title,
  o.status,
  DATEDIFF(NOW(), o.created_at) AS age_days,
  ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cf.cost_usd) FROM cost_facts cf WHERE cf.entity_type='outcome' AND cf.entity_id=o.id), 0), 2) AS cost
FROM outcomes o
WHERE o.status NOT IN ('done')
ORDER BY age_days DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Oldest Open Outcomes

panels.description: Attribution flow: total spend -> confidence class -> entity tier. Conservation: sum of first-stage outflows equals window total. (unallocated) in red per spec A3.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'total spend' AS source,
  CASE
    WHEN ua.method = 'temporal_join' THEN 'direct'
    WHEN ua.method LIKE 'temporal_join%' THEN 'inferred'
    WHEN ua.method IN ('transcript_focus_recovery','admin_warmup','gap_recovery','synthesized_outcome') THEN 'recovered'
    ELSE 'unallocated'
  END AS target,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS value
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY target
HAVING value > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN ua.method = 'temporal_join' THEN 'direct'
    WHEN ua.method LIKE 'temporal_join%' THEN 'inferred'
    WHEN ua.method IN ('transcript_focus_recovery','admin_warmup','gap_recovery','synthesized_outcome') THEN 'recovered'
    ELSE 'unallocated'
  END AS source,
  CASE
    WHEN cf.entity_type IN ('outcome','workunit') THEN cf.entity_type
    WHEN cf.entity_type != '' THEN 'legacy v1'
    ELSE 'unattributed'
  END AS target,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 2) AS value
FROM usage_attribution ua
JOIN token_ledger tl USING (message_id)
LEFT JOIN cost_facts cf ON cf.message_id = tl.message_id
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY source, target
HAVING value > 0

panels.title: Attribution Flow (spend → confidence → entity tier)

title: 09 - Teamster System Health
